title: oberonia anthropophora var. arisanensis
intro: Oberonia anthropophora var. arisanensis is a rare and lesser-known species of orchid, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oberonia anthropophora var. arisanensis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
